phaseGoal: 从主 Context Packet 派生 planner / executor / reviewer / verifier / closeout / hygiene 六类更小 role packet，让每个角色只拿到自己需要的上下文。
deliverable: RoleContextPacket schema, runtime role packet derivation, fs persistence under .threadsmith/context/role-packets
inScope: role-specific section selection for planner, executor, reviewer, verifier, closeout, and hygiene
fs-bridge persistence for role packets under .threadsmith/context/role-packets/<role>.json
targeted tests proving role packets are focused and smaller than the main packet
stopCondition: All six role packets can be derived from a main Context Packet, persisted as context artifacts, and verified to contain role-focused payloads without UI or skill protocol changes.
